commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Therefore I will make Samaria like a heap in the field, and a place for planting of a vineyard: and I will pour down its stones into the valley, and I will uncover her foundations. Septuagint, "hut to keep the fruit. "Hebrew, "hillock of the field "(Haydock) to be cultivated. (Grotius) Bare, by Salmanasar, 4 Kings xvii. It was afterwards rebuilt, (Calmet) but completely levelled by Hircan. (Josephus, Antiquities xiii.
